profiles.description: Staff queue and row anchors for `/work` triage.

source_refs.rationale: Staff queue anchors come directly from the inbox layout and validation plan.
Shell-safe queue anchors participate in semantic accessibility.

profiles.description: Calm-shell workspace anchors for summary, action, support, and module continuity.

source_refs.rationale: Workspace anchors reflect the ordered calm-shell stack and module picker.
Workspace anchors must remain stable under rebase, reconnect, and stale mutation protection.
Customer collaboration selectors stay customer-safe.
Customer request detail borrows the portal-safe selector grammar.
The portal contract explicitly names these anchors.
Portal semantic anchors are part of the route-safe accessibility contract.

profiles.description: Governance density-shell anchors across overview, policy, retention, and audit routes.

source_refs.rationale: Governance selectors are explicitly enumerated.
Governance anchors participate in semantic accessibility and regression tests.

profiles.description: Native sidebar, inspector, detached-window, and restoration anchors.

source_refs.rationale: Native scene anchors mirror sidebar, canvas, inspector, and support-window topology.
Detached windows need stable selector hooks for return-target regression checks.
